title: CDS View parameters with DEFAULT values (optional params)
description: CDS View parameters with DEFAULT values (optional params). Key topics: Parameters become OPTIONAL when they have a DEFAULT value. If caller omits the parameter, the DEFAULT is used. DEFAULT values can be:.

sections.title: Key Learning Points
sections.description:
◆Parameters become OPTIONAL when they have a DEFAULT value
◆If caller omits the parameter, the DEFAULT is used
◆DEFAULT values can be:
◆All parameters with defaults are optional — mix of optional
◆A view can have ONLY optional params (all with defaults)
◆@Semantics annotations on fields enable OData/Analytics consumption

sections.title: CDS Source Code

content:
Key Learning Points

◆Parameters become OPTIONAL when they have a DEFAULT value
◆If caller omits the parameter, the DEFAULT is used
◆DEFAULT values can be:
◆All parameters with defaults are optional — mix of optional
◆A view can have ONLY optional params (all with defaults)
◆@Semantics annotations on fields enable OData/Analytics consumption

CDS Source Code

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZPRAC_SQL_DEFPAR'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK
@EndUserText.label: 'Practice CDS - Parameters with default values (optional)'
define view ZPRAC_CDS_DEFAULT_PARAM
  with parameters
    p_currency  : abap.cuky DEFAULT 'USD',
    p_max_price : /dmo/total_price DEFAULT '99999999',
    p_min_date  : /dmo/begin_date DEFAULT '20200101'
  as select from /dmo/travel
{
  @Environment.systemField: #CLIENT
  key client            as Client,
  key travel_id         as TravelId,
      agency_id         as AgencyId,
      customer_id       as CustomerId,
      @Semantics.date: true
      begin_date        as BeginDate,
      @Semantics.date: true
      end_date          as EndDate,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
      booking_fee       as BookingFee,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
      total_price       as TotalPrice,
      currency_code     as CurrencyCode,
      description       as Description,
      status            as Status
}
where
      currency_code = $parameters.p_currency
  and total_price  <= $parameters.p_max_price
  and begin_date   >= $parameters.p_min_date
details:
- Literal strings (must match target type)

- Numeric literals

- Date literals (YYYYMMDD)

- $session.system_date (dynamic default!)

and mandatory parameters is allowed

USAGE IN ABAP:

" With all parameters (override defaults)

SELECT * FROM ZPRAC_CDS_DEFAULT_PARAM(

p_currency = 'EUR',

p_max_price = '5000' )

INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_travel1).

" Without parameters (all defaults applied)

SELECT * FROM ZPRAC_CDS_DEFAULT_PARAM( )

INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_travel2).

--> Equivalent to: currency_code = 'USD' AND max_price = 99999999
topic: Default parameter values — making parameters optional
